applicability: All federal government ministries, divisions, departments, and agencies procuring goods, services, or works using public funds in Pakistan

controls.title: Competitive Bidding Requirement
controls.description: All public procurement above the prescribed threshold must be conducted through open competitive bidding to ensure transparency and value for money.
requiredEvidence: Procurement method justification documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) citing PPRA Rule 12 or applicable rule
Competitive bidding approach referenced in project scope documentation with estimated contract value
Tender advertisement plan documented in SRS constraint requirements confirming PPRA publication requirements

controls.title: Single-Source Procurement Justification
controls.description: Procurement from a single source without competitive bidding must be formally justified with documented grounds and approval from the competent authority.
requiredEvidence: Single-source or sole-source justification documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) with specific PPRA Rule 42 grounds cited
Competent authority approval for non-competitive procurement referenced in project scope documentation

controls.title: Procurement Planning and Budgetary Approval
controls.description: All public procurement must be planned in advance with confirmed budgetary allocation and included in the annual procurement plan before initiation.
requiredEvidence: Annual procurement plan inclusion referenced in project scope documentation with budget head details
Budgetary allocation and availability certificate referenced in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*)
Procurement initiation approval from competent authority documented in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Bid Evaluation Criteria and Methodology
controls.description: Bid evaluation criteria must be predefined, published in the bidding documents, and applied consistently by the bid evaluation committee.
requiredEvidence: Bid evaluation criteria and weightings documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) referencing PPRA evaluation rules
Evaluation methodology (QCBS, LCS, or other) justified in SRS constraint requirements with applicable PPRA rule reference

controls.title: Technical Specification Compliance Verification
controls.description: Technical specifications in bidding documents must be generic and non-discriminatory, and bidder compliance with specifications must be systematically verified.
requiredEvidence: Technical specifications documented as non-discriminatory and generic in SRS functional requirements (REQ-FUNC-*)
Technical compliance verification checklist referenced in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*)

controls.title: Bid Opening Transparency
controls.description: All bids must be opened publicly at the specified date and time in the presence of bidders or their representatives with minutes of opening recorded.
requiredEvidence: Bid opening procedure referenced in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) per PPRA Rules
Bid opening minutes format and record-keeping requirement documented in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Abnormally Low Bid Assessment
controls.description: Bids priced significantly below the estimated cost must be investigated and suppliers required to demonstrate their ability to deliver at the proposed price.
requiredEvidence: Abnormally low bid policy documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) per PPRA Rules
Cost reasonableness assessment procedure referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Bidding Document Completeness
controls.description: Bidding documents must contain all information necessary for a prospective bidder to prepare a responsive bid, including technical requirements, evaluation criteria, and contractual conditions.
requiredEvidence: Bidding document checklist referenced in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) confirming PPRA standard bidding document use
Technical specifications included in SRS functional requirements (REQ-FUNC-*) for tender document preparation

controls.title: Procurement Documentation Trail
controls.description: A complete and auditable procurement documentation trail must be maintained from requisition through contract award and performance monitoring.
requiredEvidence: Procurement documentation trail requirement documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) per PPRA record-keeping rules
Document retention policy for procurement records referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Contract Award Notice Publication
controls.description: The award of every public procurement contract must be publicly notified on the PPRA website and the procuring agency's website within the prescribed period.
requiredEvidence: Contract award notice publication requirement documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) citing PPRA Rule 47
PPRA website publication plan referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Conflict of Interest Declaration
controls.description: All members of evaluation committees and procurement officials must declare any conflict of interest and be excluded from procurement processes where a conflict exists.
requiredEvidence: Conflict of interest declaration requirement documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*)
Evaluation committee independence safeguards referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Anti-Corruption and Integrity Obligations
controls.description: All procurement processes must include integrity pact requirements and anti-corruption provisions binding on all participating bidders and procurement officials.
requiredEvidence: Integrity pact and anti-corruption requirements documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*)
Anti-corruption clause inclusion in contract terms referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Procurement Complaint and Redress Mechanism
controls.description: Bidders must have access to a formal complaint mechanism to challenge procurement decisions with defined resolution timelines and escalation paths.
requiredEvidence: Bidder complaint and redress procedure documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) per PPRA Rules
Complaint resolution timeline referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Procurement Reporting and Disclosure Obligations
controls.description: Procuring agencies must report procurement activities to PPRA and disclose procurement data per the mandatory reporting schedule.
requiredEvidence: PPRA reporting obligation documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) with reporting frequency
Procurement disclosure plan referenced in project scope documentation

controls.title: Pre-Qualification of Bidders
controls.description: For complex or high-value procurements, a formal pre-qualification process must be conducted to assess bidder capability before invitation to tender.
requiredEvidence: Pre-qualification requirement and criteria documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) per PPRA Rules
Bidder capability requirements referenced in SRS constraint requirements with minimum qualification thresholds

controls.title: Framework Agreement and Rate Contract Compliance
controls.description: Procurements made under framework agreements or rate contracts must comply with the terms of the original competitive process and not exceed approved quantities or rates.
requiredEvidence: Framework agreement or rate contract compliance referenced in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*)
Applicable rate contract number and ceiling documented in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Financial Proposal Confidentiality
controls.description: Financial proposals submitted by bidders must remain sealed and confidential until the technical evaluation is completed and financial envelopes are opened.
requiredEvidence: Two-envelope bid procedure documented in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*) per PPRA two-stage evaluation rules
Financial proposal confidentiality safeguards referenced in SRS constraint requirements

controls.title: Contract Terms and Conditions Compliance
controls.description: All public procurement contracts must include mandatory PPRA contract conditions covering dispute resolution, performance security, and variation limits.
requiredEvidence: PPRA mandatory contract conditions referenced in SRS constraint requirements (REQ-CON-*)
Performance security requirement and percentage documented in SRS constraint requirements
Contract variation limit documented in SRS constraint requirements per PPRA Rules
